mapper.sql: id, user_id, plan_code, plan_name, price, start_time, end_time, status, auto_renew, features, order_id, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_subscription ( user_id, plan_code, plan_name, price, start_time, end_time, status, auto_renew, features, order_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{planCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{startTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{autoRenew, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{features, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_subscription WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_subscription ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM t_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY end_time DESC

SELECT
FROM t_subscription WHERE status = #{status, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND end_time BETWEEN #{date, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND DATE_ADD(#{date, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, INTERVAL 7 DAY) ORDER BY end_time ASC
SELECT s., FROM t_subscription s WHERE s.id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT s., FROM t_subscription s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY s.end_time DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_subscription ( user_id, plan_code, plan_name, price, start_time, end_time, status, auto_renew, features, order_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.planCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.planName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.price, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.startTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.endTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.status, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.autoRenew, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.features, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM t_subscription WHERE id IN
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
